# BMI Tool — Body Mass Index Calculator & Health Guide

> BMI Tool is a free online calculator and educational resource for understanding Body Mass Index. We help users calculate their BMI accurately and learn what the number means for their health.

## Site Overview

- **Domain**: https://bmitool.org
- **Contact**: bmitool.org@gmail.com
- **Primary Language**: English
- **Site Type**: Health tool + educational content
- **Last Updated**: 2026-05-07

## Key Pages

### Tools
- [Home / Calculator](https://bmitool.org/) — Calculate BMI with metric or imperial units. Instant results with personalized insights.
- [BMI Chart](https://bmitool.org/bmi-chart.html) — Standard weight ranges by height, metric and imperial.

### Guides
- [How to Use](https://bmitool.org/how-to-use.html) — Step-by-step guide for accurate height and weight measurement.
- [Health Risks](https://bmitool.org/health-risks.html) — What different BMI levels mean for your long-term health.
- [FAQ](https://bmitool.org/faq.html) — Common questions about BMI accuracy, muscle mass, kids, seniors, and more.

### Articles
- [What Is BMI and Why It Matters](https://bmitool.org/blog/what-is-bmi-and-why-it-matters.html)
- [How to Lower Your BMI Safely](https://bmitool.org/blog/how-to-lower-bmi-safely.html)
- [5 BMI Myths Debunked](https://bmitool.org/blog/bmi-myths-debunked.html)
- [How I Maintained a Healthy BMI for 3 Years](https://bmitool.org/blog/maintain-healthy-bmi.html)
- [Better Than BMI: 3 Alternative Tools](https://bmitool.org/blog/bmi-alternatives.html)
- [BMI for Kids Guide](https://bmitool.org/blog/bmi-for-children-guide.html)
- [BMI for Seniors](https://bmitool.org/bmi-for-seniors.html)
- [BMI vs Body Fat Percentage](https://bmitool.org/bmi-vs-body-fat.html)
- [How to Lower Your BMI: 7 Changes](https://bmitool.org/how-to-lower-bmi.html)

## Content Policy

- All health claims are backed by peer-reviewed research where possible.
- We do not provide medical advice. Users should consult healthcare professionals.
- No personal health data is collected or stored.
